PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?player WHERE {
  ?player p:P54 ?currentStmt ; ps:P54 wd:Q275328 ; pq:P580 ?currentStart .

}
